title: BP | Barebone Performance
description:
This is a new highly optimized performance pack
From 400Fps vanila to 1700FPS BP
body:
# ⚡ Barebone Performance

> 🚀 Transform your vanilla Minecraft experience from ~400 FPS to **up to 1700+ FPS** with this highly optimized Fabric modpack.
> Built for **maximum performance, stability, and smooth gameplay** without sacrificing the vanilla feel.

> ## Please allocate at least **4 GB** of Java memory to your Minecraft instance!

---

## 🧠 What is Barebone Performance?

Barebone Performance is a **minimal, no-bloat optimization pack** focused purely on:

* 🔥 Extreme FPS boosts
* ⚡ Eliminating lag spikes
* 🧩 Fixing vanilla inefficiencies
* 🎮 Keeping gameplay **100% vanilla**

No extra content. No gameplay changes. Just **raw performance**.

---

## 📈 Performance Gains

| Scenario           | Vanilla FPS  | Barebone Performance |
| ------------------ | ------------ | -------------------- |
| Idle (no movement) | ~400 FPS     | **1200–1700 FPS**    |
| Exploring terrain  | ~200–300 FPS | **700–1600 FPS**     |
| Heavy entity areas | ~100 FPS     | **500–900 FPS**      |

> ⚠️ Performance depends on your hardware, but major improvements are guaranteed.

---

## 🧩 Included Mods

### ⚙️ Core Optimization

* Fabric API *(0.138.4+1.21.10)*
* Lithium
* Krypton
* ImmediatelyFast
* VulkanMod
* Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)

---

### 🎯 Rendering & FPS Boosters

* Entity Culling
* BadOptimizations
* Clumps

---

### 🛠️ Fixes & Improvements

* Debugify
* Let Me Despawn
* Language Reload
* Remove Reloading Screen

---

### ⚙️ Config & Utility

* Mod Menu
* Cloth Config API
* YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
* Forge Config API Port
* Text Placeholder API
* Almanac
* Fancy Menu
* Drippy Loading Screen
* Konkrete
* Smooth Swapping
* Smooth Scrolling
* Melody
* Chat Animations
* MCEF Modern

---

### 📊 Debug & Info

* BetterF3

---

## 🎮 Why Barebone Performance?

✔️ Up to **4x–5x more FPS than vanilla**
✔️ No gameplay changes
✔️ Works on low-end & high-end PCs
✔️ Lightweight and clean
✔️ Multiplayer-friendly

---

## ⚡ Key Features

* 🚀 **Up to 1700+ FPS**
* 🧠 CPU & memory optimizations
* 🌍 Faster chunk loading
* 📉 Reduced lag spikes
* 🔧 Fully configurable

---

## 💡 Recommended Settings

```
- Allocate 4–8GB RAM
- Lower render distance if CPU bottlenecked
```

---

## ❗ Notes

* VulkanMod may not support all GPUs
* Best used with updated drivers
* Designed for Fabric 1.21.10

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the modrinth app and log-in.
2. Download the modpack and start it.
3. Enjoy your high fps!

---

## ❤️ Credits

Huge thanks to all mod developers who made this performance pack possible.

---

## 🔥 Final Words

From **~400 FPS to 1700+ FPS**, Barebone Performance delivers one thing:

**Pure speed. No compromises.**
